expectations.text: No bare useStore() — all store access uses selectors
expectations.evidence: use-tasks-api.ts line 19: 'const { setTasks, addTask, toggleTask, setLoading, setError } = useTaskStore()' — bare destructuring of entire store. Programmatic grep missed this due to multi-line destructuring.

expectations.text: Server data fetched via useQuery, not useState+useEffect+fetch
expectations.evidence: use-tasks-api.ts uses useEffect + fetch + manual setState pattern. No TanStack Query dependency at all.

expectations.text: Mutations use useMutation with onSuccess invalidation
expectations.evidence: No useMutation found. Creates/toggles tasks via manual fetch() calls with direct Zustand store mutations.

expectations.text: Query keys follow [domain, action, params] pattern
expectations.evidence: No TanStack Query used, therefore no query keys at all.

expectations.text: Derived state computed in selectors, not stored
expectations.evidence: useFilteredTasks() function computes filtered tasks from store selectors, not stored as separate state.
task-store.ts has no reset() method and no initialState extraction. No test teardown support.

expectations.text: Proper state colocation: server data in TQ, UI state in Zustand/URL
expectations.evidence: Tasks (server data) stored directly in Zustand alongside filter (UI state). Everything in one store. Should be: tasks in TQ cache, filter in Zustand.
